description: Request body for the atomic-fix dispatch endpoint POST /v1/fix/run/{fix_id} (src/api/v1/fix_routes.py, class RunFixRequest). Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6), so it is constitutionally required to carry a governing schema. An empty body is valid and equals a default-constructed model (dry-run, no file restriction). Authority: ADR-056 D7 (#454).

target_files.description: Optional list of files to restrict the fix to (list[str] | None). None applies the action's default scope.

write.description: Dry-run safety flag (ADR-014). Defaults to false; true persists the fix.

requested_by.description: Attribution recorded on the core.fix_runs row. Defaults to 'api'.

params.description: Action-specific kwargs forwarded as **kwargs to ActionExecutor.execute (e.g. fix.docstrings's `limit`).
